category_sources: source_facts.description says service manager; official GNU Shepherd page describes a service manager for system and user services, including PID 1 use.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page and manual use GNU Shepherd as the product name; source_facts.name is shepherd.
docs_sources: Official GNU Shepherd manual is dedicated documentation; official GNU Shepherd homepage provides overview and project context.
repo_sources: Official GNU Shepherd Savannah Git repositories page lists the project Git repository; GNU project pages identify Shepherd as the official project.
tags_sources: Official GNU Shepherd page describes managing daemons, PID 1 use, user services, socket activation, timers, and Guile Scheme configuration.
